user_stories.title: Parallel Track A + Track B Execution
user_stories.i_want: Track A (testing) and Track B (QA) to run simultaneously
user_stories.so_that: Phase 16 completes in half the time

user_stories.title: Internal Track A Parallelism for Large Suites
user_stories.i_want: Track A to internally parallelize build, test execution, and mutation testing

user_stories.title: Internal Track B Parallelism for Full QA Tooling
user_stories.as_a: developer with ESLint, TypeScript, Snyk, and npm audit configured
user_stories.i_want: Track B to run lint+type-check in parallel with SAST+dependency-audit
user_stories.so_that: QA checks don't bottleneck the quality loop

user_stories.title: Graceful Degradation with Minimal Tooling
user_stories.as_a: developer with only unit tests and no QA tools
user_stories.i_want: Track B to gracefully skip all checks and report NOT CONFIGURED without errors
user_stories.so_that: the quality loop runs correctly for projects with limited tooling

user_stories.title: Parallel Re-Execution on Failure
user_stories.as_a: developer whose quality loop finds failures
user_stories.i_want: both tracks to re-run in parallel after fixes are applied
user_stories.so_that: the speedup benefit is maintained across iterations
